query_normalized: predicting molecular ionization energies with graph neural networks chemistry
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) and (f) as it provides a foundational benchmark and comparative analysis of Graph Neural Network architectures (GCN, GIN) specifically for molecular property regression tasks, which is the canonical methodological reference required for any study predicting molecular properties like ionization energies using GNNs.
